calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-20-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lisa Carreno appeared by telephone for Rita Scardaci.

The Court stated that the Executor's fees should be reduced by the fees requested by Specialized Services. Ms. Carreno stated that she advised her Client to engage in the services of Specialized Services to do the accounting due to the complexity of the matter, that it was in the best interest of the Estate and the Beneficiary, and that the petition was unopposed. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
